note: This is the template. For each active SPM, create spm_{subsystem}_state.json by copying and filling in the subsystem-specific values. Remove all schema-documentation objects from arrays before use — arrays must be empty at initialisation.

coder_registry_schema.note: Schema for objects in coder_registry array. Not a real entry.
coder_registry_schema.active: boolean — true if this coder is currently assigned work
coder_registry_schema.current_task_id: string — TSK message_id of current task or empty string

task_backlog_schema.note: Schema for objects in task_backlog array. Not a real entry.
task_backlog_schema.title: string
task_backlog_schema.dependencies: array of strings — task_ids that must be done first
task_backlog_schema.tool_awaited: string — tool name being waited for, or empty string if none
task_backlog_schema.ppm_assignment_id: string — TAS message_id of the PPM task_assignment

active_task_schema.note: Schema for objects in active_tasks array. Not a real entry.
active_task_schema.title: string
active_task_schema.cag_message_id: string — CAG message_id of the coder_assignment sent
active_task_schema.status: string — enum: in_progress | in_review | qa_pending | blocked
active_task_schema.pre_block_status: string — status before entering blocked, or empty string
active_task_schema.cr_sign_off_id: string — RRS message_id with decision approved, or empty string
active_task_schema.qa_sign_off_id: string — QA approval message_id or empty string
active_task_schema.doc_sign_off_id: string — Documenter confirmation message_id or empty string
active_task_schema.code_package_id: string — CPK message_id of latest code delivery
active_task_schema.review_request_id: string — RRQ message_id of active review request

active_blocker_schema.note: Schema for objects in active_blockers array. Not a real entry.

tool_registry_schema.note: Schema for objects in tool_registry array. Not a real entry.
